title: LLMai — Agentic Ops (index=mcp_agents)
description: Closed-loop AI observability: LLM cost, routing, cache, DLP, and Splunk-driven auto-remediation for the MCPAgents x Splunk platform.

options.query: index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_llm_call | stats sum(cost_usd) as total_cost
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_llm_call | stats count as calls
index=mcp_agents (event_type=mcp_cache_hit OR event_type=mcp_cache_miss) | stats count(eval(event_type="mcp_cache_hit")) as hits count as total | eval hit_rate=round(hits/total*100,1)
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_dlp_violation | stats count as violations
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_llm_call | timechart span=1h sum(cost_usd) by model
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_llm_call | stats count by model | sort - count
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_router_decision | stats count by selected_model
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_anomaly | table _time, anomaly_type, metric_name, current_value, threshold, remediation_triggered | sort - _time
index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_dlp_violation | table _time, rule_id, sensitivity, action_taken | sort - _time

ds_resource_gauge.name: Resource Gauge — Cost / Cache / Error arcs

options.query: index=mcp_agents event_type=mcp_llm_call | stats sum(cost_usd) as total_cost count(eval(success=false OR success="false")) as errors count as total | eval cpu_pct=round(min(total_cost/12.0*100, 100), 1) | eval mem_pct=round((1-(errors/max(total,1)))*100, 1) | eval disk_pct=round(errors/max(total,1)*100, 2) | fields cpu_pct mem_pct disk_pct

index=mcp_agents earliest=-5m | stats count by event_type | eval component=case(event_type="mcp_llm_call","Multi-LLM Router",event_type="mcp_cache_hit" OR event_type="mcp_cache_miss","Semantic Cache",event_type="mcp_dlp_violation","DLP Engine",event_type="mcp_anomaly","Auto-Remediation",event_type="mcp_router_decision","Intelligent Router",1=1,"HEC Telemetry") | stats sum(count) as event_count by component | eval errors=0, warns=0 | eval status=if(event_count>0,"ok","warning") | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 | eval component="HEC Telemetry", errors=1, warns=0, status="critical", event_count=0] | table component errors warns status

ds_component_static.name: Component Status — static fallback for demo

options.query: | makeresults count=6 | streamstats count as row | eval component=case(row=1,"HEC Telemetry",row=2,"Splunk MCP Tool",row=3,"SOAR Bridge",row=4,"Auto-Remediation",row=5,"DLP Engine",row=6,"Multi-LLM Router") | eval errors=0, warns=case(row=2,1,1=1,0) | eval status=if(errors>0,"critical",if(warns>0,"warning","ok")) | table component errors warns status

options.markdown:
# 🔥 LLMai — Agentic Ops Control Center
**Closed loop:** MCPAgents → HEC → `index=mcp_agents` → Splunk anomaly detection → auto-remediation back into the agent. Default window: last 24h.

viz_resource_gauge.title: System Health — Cost Budget % / Success Rate % / Error Rate % (last 1h)
